title: Experts warn raising social media age limit might not improve youth safety
title_zh: 专家警告称，提高社交媒体年龄限制可能并不能改善青少年安全状况。
description: Raising the minimum age for social media use will not necessarily make online spaces safer for young people, according to Nastasia Griffioen, a researcher and coordinator at the Expertise Center fo
description_zh: 据专家中心的研究员兼协调员纳斯塔西娅·格里菲恩 (Nastasia Griffioen) 称，提高社交媒体使用的最低年龄并不一定会让网络空间对年轻人更安全。

title: Video: Princess Beatrix privately celebrates 88th birthday at Drakensteyn Castle
title_zh: 视频：贝娅特丽克丝公主在德拉肯斯坦城堡低调庆祝88岁生日
description: Princess Beatrix marked her 88th birthday Saturday in private at Drakensteyn Castle, according to the Dutch Royal House.
description_zh: 据荷兰王室消息，贝娅特丽克丝公主于周六在德拉肯斯坦城堡低调庆祝了她的 88 岁生日。

title: Thousands protest Iranian regime, Syrian violence in separate marches in The Hague
title_zh: 数千人在海牙分别举行游行，抗议伊朗政权和叙利亚的暴力行为。
description: On Saturday afternoon, thousands gathered in The Hague for separate protests against the Iranian regime and violence targeting Kurds in Syria.
description_zh: 周六下午，数千人在海牙聚集，分别举行抗议活动，反对伊朗政权和叙利亚境内针对库尔德人的暴力行为。

title: KLM welcomes EU-linked air travel tax, warns night closure at Schiphol threatens economy
title_zh: 荷航欢迎欧盟推出航空旅行税，但警告称史基浦机场夜间关闭将威胁经济。
description: KLM welcomed the coalition agreement of D66, CDA, and VVD, which confirmed that the air travel tax should be equal across all EU countries, but warned that a potential night closure at Schiphol Air
description_zh: 荷航对D66、CDA和VVD的联合执政协议表示欢迎，该协议确认欧盟所有国家的航空旅行税应保持一致，但同时警告称，史基浦机场可能因此面临夜间停飞的风险。

title: Dutch healthcare groups criticize deductible hike, support medicine shortage measures
title_zh: 荷兰医疗保健团体批评提高自付额，支持药品短缺应对措施。
description: Dutch healthcare organizations reacted with a mix of praise and concern following the D66, VVD, and CDA coalition’s
description_zh: 荷兰医疗机构对D66、VVD和CDA联盟的行动反应不一，既有赞扬也有担忧。

title: Dutch police arrest six in Amsterdam fake bank scam; 14-year-old girl caught in act
title_zh: 荷兰警方在阿姆斯特丹逮捕六名涉嫌假银行诈骗的嫌疑人；一名14岁女孩当场被抓。
description: In Amsterdam, the police have arrested six people in an investigation into a so-calledbabbeltruc—a confidence scam in which criminals pretend to, for example, be a police officer to trick
description_zh: 在阿姆斯特丹，警方逮捕了六人，他们涉嫌参与一种名为“babbeltruc”的诈骗活动——这是一种骗子冒充警察等身份进行诈骗的手段。

title: Dutch tobacco industry slams plan to raise smoking, vaping age to 21
title_zh: 荷兰烟草业猛烈抨击将吸烟和电子烟使用年龄提高到21岁的计划
description: Dutch tobacco manufacturers sharply criticized a proposal by coalition parties D66, VVD, and CDA to raise the legal age for buying tobacco and e-cigarettes to 21, as the government pushes toward wh
description_zh: 荷兰烟草制造商强烈批评了执政联盟政党D66、VVD和CDA提出的将购买烟草和电子烟的法定年龄提高到21岁的提案，因为政府正朝着这个方向努力。

title: Six vehicles collide on N261 near Waalwijk; One person hospitalized, children involved
title_zh: 瓦尔韦克附近N261公路发生六车相撞事故；一人受伤住院，事故中有儿童。
description: A multi-vehicle crash on the Midden-Brabantweg (N261) near Waalwijk on Friday evening involved six cars and sent one person to the hospital, while several others, including children, were checked f
description_zh: 周五晚间，瓦尔韦克附近的米登-布拉班特公路（N261）发生一起涉及六辆汽车的多车连环相撞事故，造成一人被送往医院，另有多人（包括儿童）接受了检查。

title: German suspect extradited in Rijswijk terrace murder; Two others remain at large
title_zh: 一名德国嫌犯因涉嫌在赖斯韦克露台谋杀案被引渡回国；另有两名嫌犯仍然在逃。
description: A German man has been extradited to the Netherlands in connection with aterrace sho
description_zh: 一名德国男子因涉嫌与露台谋杀案有关而被引渡到荷兰。

title: Dutch homeowners cautiously optimistic about coalition housing plans
title_zh: 荷兰房主对联合政府的住房计划持谨慎乐观态度
description: Dutch homeowners are cautiously welcoming the coalition agreement between D66, CDA, and VVD, warning that key details are still unclear.
description_zh: 荷兰房主们对D66、CDA和VVD之间的联合执政协议表示谨慎欢迎，但同时警告说，一些关键细节仍不清楚。

title: Dordrecht to Boom Chicago: 10 great things to do in February
title_zh: 从多德雷赫特到繁荣的芝加哥：二月十大精彩活动
description: It’s February and the new cultural season is in full string. There are plenty of great exhibitions to visit while...
description_zh: 二月已至，新的文化季也如火如荼地展开。期间有很多精彩的展览值得参观……

title: Chip stocks lift AEX above 1,000; Signify plunges 17% after weak earnings
title_zh: 芯片股推动AEX指数突破1000点；昕诺飞财报疲软，股价暴跌17%。
description: The AEX index in Amsterdam, the benchmark tracking the 25 largest Dutch companies, closed higher Friday, helped by gains in chipmakers Besi, ASMI, and ASML, while the MidKap, which tracks mid-sized
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹AEX指数（追踪荷兰25家最大公司的基准指数）周五收高，芯片制造商Besi、ASMI和ASML的股价上涨提振了该指数；而追踪中型企业的MidKap指数也呈现上涨趋势。

title: Invisible ice makes roads risky in Northern Netherlands; Code yellow until 12:00 p.m.
title_zh: 荷兰北部道路结冰，路面隐患重重；黄色预警持续至中午12点。
description: A yellow warning for ice is in effect Saturday morning in Friesland, Drenthe, Groningen, and the Wadden Islands, with a high risk of accidents on roads, bike paths, sidewalks, and bridges, weeronli
description_zh: 周六上午，弗里斯兰省、德伦特省、格罗宁根省和瓦登群岛发布了冰雪黄色预警，道路、自行车道、人行道和桥梁上发生事故的风险较高。

title: Police rescue kidnapped man in Amsterdam-Noord after abduction that began in Purmerend
title_zh: 皮尔默伦德发生绑架事件后，警方在阿姆斯特丹努德解救了被绑架的男子
description: Police freed a kidnapped man from a car on the IJdoornlaan in Amsterdam-Noord Thursday night after an abduction that began earlier in Purmerend, authorities told
description_zh: 警方周四晚间在阿姆斯特丹北部的IJdoornlaan街解救了一名被绑架男子，该男子此前在普尔默伦德遭到绑架。

title: Video: Apartment fire in Den Helder injures 11, sends 6 to hospital; Asbestos suspected
title_zh: 视频：登海尔德一栋公寓发生火灾，11人受伤，6人入院；怀疑含有石棉。
description: A nighttime fire in an apartment building in Den Helder injured 11 people, sent six to the hospital, and led authorities to cordon off the area after discovering material described as “asbestos-sus
description_zh: 丹麦登海尔德一栋公寓楼夜间发生火灾，造成11人受伤，其中6人被送往医院。火灾现场发现疑似石棉材料后，当局封锁了该区域。

title: Two arrested after suspected arson sparks apartment fire in Waalwijk
title_zh: 瓦尔韦克一栋公寓楼发生火灾，两名嫌疑人被捕，他们涉嫌纵火。
description: Two men were arrested after a short but intense apartment fire forced the overnight evacuation of a residential complex in Waalwijk, in Noord-Brabant.
description_zh: 德国北布拉班特省瓦尔韦克市一处住宅区发生短暂但猛烈的公寓火灾，导致该住宅区连夜疏散，两名男子被捕。

title: All stars: Rutte’s shoes go under the hammer at VVD auction
title_zh: 群星闪耀：吕特的鞋子将在自由民主党拍卖会上被拍卖
description: The world might wonder at Donald Trump’s hands but the topic on everyone’s minds at the luxury Hotel des Indes...
description_zh: 全世界或许会对唐纳德·特朗普的所作所为感到震惊，但在豪华的印度酒店，每个人心中都在谈论的话题却是……

title: Medicine shortages halve in the Netherlands, but millions still at risk
title_zh: 荷兰药品短缺情况减少了一半，但仍有数百万人面临风险。
description: The number of medicine shortages in Dutch pharmacies has halved over the past two years, yet pharmacists warn that patients and healthcare providers still face serious challenges.
description_zh: 过去两年，荷兰药店药品短缺的数量减少了一半，但药剂师警告说，患者和医疗保健提供者仍然面临严峻的挑战。

title: Nearly half of Dutch students report high academic pressure; Highest in Amsterdam
title_zh: 近半数荷兰学生表示学业压力巨大；阿姆斯特丹学生的压力最大。
description: The pressure on Dutch youth to perform academically has nearly tripled in the past two decades, according to a new nationwide report.
description_zh: 一份新的全国性报告显示，过去二十年里，荷兰青少年在学业上面临的压力几乎增加了两倍。

title: Dutch gov’t working on laws against Russian fleet of espionage ships
title_zh: 荷兰政府正在制定针对俄罗斯间谍船队的法律。
description: Legislation is being prepared to allow stricter measures against ships in the Russian shadow fleet that operate under false flags to bypass oil sanctions.
description_zh: 目前正在制定立法，以便对悬挂假旗、规避石油制裁的俄罗斯影子舰队船只采取更严格的措施。

title: Amsterdam scores 9.5 in National Municipal Finances review, beats most large cities
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹在全国市政财政评估中获得9.5分，胜过大多数大城市。
description: Financially, Amsterdam is doing very well. In BDO’s annual review comparing all Dutch municipalities, the city scored 9.5 out of 10.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹的财政状况非常出色。在BDO对荷兰所有城市进行的年度评估中，该市得分9.5分（满分10分）。

title: Dutch water boards capture 84,438 muskrats in 2025 as invasive rodents threaten dikes
title_zh: 荷兰水务局计划在2025年捕获84438只麝鼠，因为入侵性啮齿动物威胁着堤坝。
description: Muskrats, semi-aquatic rodents that dig extensive burrows in riverbanks and dikes, surged across the Netherlands in 2025.
description_zh: 麝鼠是一种半水生啮齿动物，它们会在河岸和堤坝上挖掘大量的洞穴，2025 年，麝鼠的数量激增，遍布荷兰各地。

title: Dutch gov’t working on stricter patent rules to prevent copies from China: report
title_zh: 据报道，荷兰政府正着手制定更严格的专利规则，以防止来自中国的仿冒产品。
description: The caretaker Dutch government wants to significantly amend the Patent Act to better protect the value of Dutch innovations and prevent abuse from countries like China, sources close to t
description_zh: 据接近该机构的消息人士透露，荷兰看守政府希望大幅修改《专利法》，以更好地保护荷兰创新成果的价值，并防止中国等国家滥用专利权。

title: Academic hospital staff to get a 7 percent pay raise under new labor agreement
title_zh: 根据新的劳动协议，教学医院员工将获得7%的加薪。
description: Staff at the university medical centers (UMCs) are set to receive a 7 percent salary increase in the coming years.
description_zh: 未来几年，大学医疗中心 (UMC) 的员工将获得 7% 的加薪。

title: Dutch quantum sector needs at least €9.4 billion to stay ahead in technology race
title_zh: 荷兰量子产业至少需要94亿欧元才能在技术竞赛中保持领先地位
description: The Dutch quantum sector needs significant investments to stay ahead in the technology race.
description_zh: 荷兰量子产业需要大量投资才能在技术竞赛中保持领先地位。

title: Opposition weighs support and criticism after minority coalition agreement
title_zh: 反对派权衡少数派联合政府协议后的支持与批评
description: Opposition parties reacted sharply on Friday to thecoalition agreement
description_zh: 反对党周五对联合执政协议反应强烈。

title: No change on dual nationality but 10-year residence plan dropped
title_zh: 双重国籍政策不变，但取消了10年居住计划。
description: The incoming Dutch government has no plans to change the laws on dual nationality to make it possible for all...
description_zh: 即将上任的荷兰政府没有计划修改双重国籍法，使所有人都能拥有双重国籍……

title: Video: Calf born with five legs finds home at Drenthe farm
title_zh: 视频：五条腿小牛在德伦特农场找到新家
description: Wilma Boerhof, a farmer in the Drenthe village of Dalerpeel, has taken in a quite unusual calf. The baby calf was born with five legs. The extra one dangles from one of its front legs.
description_zh: 德伦特省达勒佩尔村的农民威尔玛·博尔霍夫收养了一头非常特别的小牛。这头小牛生来就有五条腿，多余的一条腿耷拉在它的一条前腿上。

title: Royal Family’s King’s Day route in Dokkum revealed; Festival weekend planned
title_zh: 国王节期间，皇室成员在多库姆的游览路线已公布；节日周末活动安排已确定。
description: Noardeast-Fryslân municipality has revealed the route King Willem-Alexander and his family will follow during King’s Day celebrations in Dokkum on Monday, April 27.
description_zh: 弗里斯兰东北市公布了威廉-亚历山大国王及其家人在4月27日星期一多库姆国王节庆祝活动期间的行进路线。

title: New coalition to overhaul Box 3 wealth tax, scrap annual levy on unrealized gains
title_zh: 新联盟将改革第三类财富税，取消对未实现收益的年度征税。
description: The new coalition plans to revise the current Box 3 wealth tax system again.
description_zh: 新联盟计划再次修订现行的第三类财富税制度。

title: New coalition: €1.5 billion for higher ed, stop cuts to English-language courses
title_zh: 新联合政府：拨款15亿欧元用于高等教育，停止削减英语课程经费
description: The three parties forming a new coalition government in the Netherlands want to structurally invest €1.5 billion structurally in education and scientific research.
description_zh: 荷兰新组建的联合政府的三个政党希望对教育和科学研究进行结构性投资 15 亿欧元。

title: Podcast: The Our Orange Is The Best Orange Edition
title_zh: 播客：我们的橙子是最好的橙子版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: The new government’s plans: a round-up of the main points
title_zh: 新政府的计划：要点概述
description: The next Dutch coalition government published its strategy for the next four years on Friday, outlining a tougher approach to...
description_zh: 荷兰下一届联合政府于周五公布了未来四年的战略，概述了其更为强硬的应对措施……

title: Six babies fall ill after consuming Nestlé baby food, Dutch authorities say
title_zh: 荷兰当局称，六名婴儿在食用雀巢婴儿食品后生病。
description: The Dutch Food and Consumer Product Safety Authority (NVWA) has received six reports of babies becoming ill after consuming Nestlé products that are under a safety alert so far.
description_zh: 荷兰食品和消费品安全管理局 (NVWA) 目前已收到六起婴儿在食用雀巢公司发布的安全警示产品后生病的报告。

title: Minority Cabinet deal: Billions for Defense, social media age minimum, later retirement
title_zh: 少数派内阁协议：数十亿英镑国防预算、社交媒体最低年龄限制、延迟退休
description: D66, VVD, and CDA unveiled their coalition plans on Friday, covering major defense investments, new taxes to fund security, Lelystad Airport’s opening, stricter social media rules, and wide-ranging
description_zh: D66、VVD 和 CDA 于周五公布了他们的联盟计划，内容涵盖重大国防投资、为安全提供资金的新税收、莱利斯塔德机场的开放、更严格的社交媒体规则以及其他广泛的议题。

title: Next Dutch gov’t will be a “cabinet of collaboration”: Jetten
title_zh: 下一届荷兰政府将是一个“合作内阁”：杰滕
description: The three parties forming the new Dutch coalition government presented their plans for the next four years on Friday, including...
description_zh: 组成荷兰新联合政府的三个政党于周五公布了未来四年的施政纲领，其中包括……

title: French rape survivor Gisèle Pelicot honored for breaking silence at Four Freedoms Awards
title_zh: 法国强奸幸存者吉赛尔·佩利科特因打破沉默而荣获四大自由奖表彰。
description: This year’s Four Freedoms Awards will go in part to Gisèle Pelicot and the Committee to Protect Journalists, according to the Roosevelt Foundation in the Netherlands.
description_zh: 据荷兰罗斯福基金会称，今年的四大自由奖将部分授予吉赛尔·佩利科特和保护记者委员会。

title: Job vacancies drop while unemployment increases in Netherlands at end of 2025
title_zh: 到2025年底，荷兰的职位空缺将减少，而失业率将上升。
description: The labor market became slightly less tight at the end of 2025.
description_zh: 到 2025 年底，劳动力市场略有缓解。

title: Dutch government could prevent American takeover of DigiD platform: tech experts
title_zh: 技术专家：荷兰政府或可阻止美国收购DigiD平台
description: Caretaker Minister Vincent Karremans of Economic Affairs could ban theacq
description_zh: 经济事务看守部长文森特·卡雷曼斯可能会禁止收购

title: Dutch economy outperforms forecasts, books 1.9% growth
title_zh: 荷兰经济表现优于预期，实现1.9%的增长
description: The Dutch economy grew faster than expected in 2025, expanding by 1.9% over the year, according to provisional figures from...
description_zh: 根据初步数据，荷兰经济在2025年增速超过预期，全年增长1.9%。

title: Philips lighting spin-off Signify to cut 900 jobs due to weak 2025 results, poor outlook
title_zh: 飞利浦照明分拆公司昕诺飞(Signify)因2025年业绩疲软、前景黯淡，将裁员900人。
description: Eindhoven lighting company Signify announced new cost-cutting plans on Friday, which will lead to 900 job cuts globally.
description_zh: 埃因霍温照明公司昕诺飞（Signify）周五宣布了新的成本削减计划，这将导致全球范围内裁员900人。

title: Dutch consumer watchdog launches probe into Roblox and children
title_zh: 荷兰消费者权益保护机构对 Roblox 与儿童关系展开调查
description: The Dutch consumer watchdog has launched an investigation into the online gaming platform Roblox over potential risks to children, the...
description_zh: 荷兰消费者权益保护机构已对在线游戏平台 Roblox 展开调查，原因是该平台可能对儿童构成潜在风险……

title: Defence ministry may relax zero-tolerance police on soft drugs
title_zh: 国防部或将放松对软性毒品的零容忍政策
description: The ministry of defence may relax its zero-tolerance policy for soft drug use by soldiers and shift the focus to...
description_zh: 国防部可能会放宽对士兵使用软性毒品的零容忍政策，并将重点转移到……

title: Job vacancies are down, unemployment is up to 4%: CBS
title_zh: 哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）报道，职位空缺减少，失业率升至4%。
description: Unemployment in the Netherlands is on the rise, confirming a trend of the last three years, statistics agency CBS said...
description_zh: 荷兰中央统计局（CBS）表示，荷兰失业率正在上升，这证实了过去三年来的趋势……

title: Nestlé knew about baby formula contamination at Dutch plant 10 days before first recall
title_zh: 雀巢公司在首次召回前10天就知道其荷兰工厂的婴儿配方奶粉受到污染。
description: Nestlé admitted to having detected cereulide in some of its baby formula products at its Dutch factory over 10 days before carrying out its first recalls.
description_zh: 雀巢公司承认，在首次召回产品之前的 10 天内，该公司在其荷兰工厂的部分婴儿配方奶粉产品中检测到了蜡样芽孢杆菌毒素。

title: Netherlands saw 1.9 percent economic growth in 2025, incl. 0.5 percent in Q4
title_zh: 荷兰预计2025年经济增长率为1.9%，其中第四季度增长0.5%。
description: The Dutch economy recorded growth of 1.9 percent in the country’s gross domestic product over the whole of 2025, the national data office Statistics Netherlands (CBS)
description_zh: 荷兰国家统计局（CBS）的数据显示，到2025年，荷兰经济的国内生产总值将增长1.9%。

title: Dutch regulator investigating Roblox for not sufficiently protecting children
title_zh: 荷兰监管机构正在调查 Roblox 是否未能充分保护儿童权益。
description: The Netherlands Authority for Consumers and Markets (ACM) has launched an investigation into Roblox.
description_zh: 荷兰消费者和市场管理局（ACM）已对 Roblox 展开调查。

title: It’s a farmers’ smock, not a banana suit, in Oeteldonk this year
title_zh: 今年在厄特尔登克，人们穿的是农民的工作服，而不是香蕉服。
description: Carnaval in Den Bosch in Brabant has become too much of a “festival” and should return to its traditional roots,...
description_zh: 西班牙布拉班特省登博斯市的狂欢节已经变得过于“节日化”，应该回归其传统根源……

title: Fewer refugees come to NL but 100 councils still have no beds
title_zh: 前往荷兰的难民人数减少，但仍有100个地方议会没有床位。
description: In total, 21,100 people applied for refugee status in the Netherlands last year, 8,000 fewer than in 2024, national statistics...
description_zh: 据荷兰国家统计局数据显示，去年共有21100人在荷兰申请难民身份，比2024年减少了8000人。

title: New Cabinet to increase healthcare deductible, keep mortgage interest reduction
title_zh: 新内阁将提高医疗保健自付额，并维持抵押贷款利息减免政策。
description: 94 days into the Cabinet formation process, and the D66, VVD, and CDA are ready to present their coalition agreement.
description_zh: 内阁组建过程已进行了 94 天，D66、VVD 和 CDA 已准备好提交他们的联合执政协议。

title: ProRail planning trains every 7.5 minutes in large parts of the Randstad
title_zh: ProRail计划在兰斯塔德的大部分地区每7.5分钟开行一趟列车。
description: ProRail is working on increasing rail traffic to trains running every 7.5 minutes in large parts of the Randstad and busy routes outside it, ProRail’s program manager Anne Zwiers told the
description_zh: ProRail项目经理安妮·兹维尔斯告诉记者，ProRail正在努力增加铁路客运量，力争在兰斯塔德的大部分地区以及该地区以外的繁忙线路上实现每7.5分钟一班的列车。

title: Brussels to take a “more strategic approach” to EU visas
title_zh: 布鲁塞尔将对欧盟签证采取“更具战略性的方法”
description: Using visas “in a more strategic, coordinated, and assertive way” is a key part of new EU migration measures announced...
description_zh: 以“更具战略性、协调性和积极性的方式”使用签证是欧盟宣布的新移民措施的关键组成部分……

title: New home construction misses target for third year in a row
title_zh: 新房建设连续第三年未达标
description: The number of new homes coming onto the market in 2025 failed to meet government targets for the third year...
description_zh: 2025年新房上市数量连续第三年未能达到政府目标……

title: Dutch set to lose Champions League place after disaster night
title_zh: 荷兰队在经历灾难之夜后或将失去欧冠资格
description: Feyenoord, Go Ahead Eagles and FC Utrecht are all out of the Europa League following losses and a draw on...
description_zh: 费耶诺德、前进之鹰和乌得勒支均因一场失利和一场平局而从欧联杯出局……

title: Netherlands again misses construction target; Fewer homes built for 3rd year
title_zh: 荷兰再次未能达到建筑目标；连续第三年房屋建造量减少
description: For the third year in a row, the Netherlands added fewer homes to its housing stock in 2025.
description_zh: 荷兰连续第三年预测，到 2025 年，该国新增住房数量将减少。

title: More icy road accidents in north Netherlands as slippery conditions persist
title_zh: 荷兰北部路面结冰湿滑，交通事故频发
description: Icy roads continued to cause accidents in the northern provinces overnight.
description_zh: 昨夜，北部各省路面结冰，交通事故频发。

title: Ice warnings and flu surge keep Groningen, Drenthe, Friesland hospitals busy in January
title_zh: 一月份，冰冻预警和流感激增导致格罗宁根、德伦特和弗里斯兰的医院繁忙不堪。
description: Hospitals in Groningen, Drenthe, and Friesland have seen a hectic start to January. Between January 1 and 29, the KNMI issued ice warnings on 21 days across the three northern provinces.
description_zh: 格罗宁根、德伦特和弗里斯兰的医院在1月份伊始就异常忙碌。1月1日至29日期间，荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）在这三个北部省份共发布了21天的冰冻预警。

title: Seven in ten Dutch travel companies are vague about holiday cancellation fees
title_zh: 十家荷兰旅行社中有七家对假期取消费用含糊其辞。
description: Seven in ten large Dutch travel companies provide unclear information about cancellation policies and associated fees, according to research by the Dutch consumer association, Consumentenbond.
description_zh: 荷兰消费者协会 Consumentenbond 的一项研究显示，十家大型荷兰旅行社中有七家提供的取消政策和相关费用信息不明确。

title: Feyenoord exit the Europa League after 2–1 defeat away to Real Betis
title_zh: 费耶诺德在欧联杯客场1-2负于皇家贝蒂斯后出局。
description: Feyenoord were knocked out of the UEFA Europa League on Thursday evening after suffering a 2-1 loss away to Spanish side Real Betis.
description_zh: 费耶诺德在周四晚的欧足联欧洲联赛中客场1-2负于西班牙球队皇家贝蒂斯，惨遭淘汰。

title: Go Ahead Eagles held to goalless draw by Braga, eliminated from the Europa League
title_zh: 前进之鹰队与布拉加队0-0战平，被淘汰出欧联杯。
description: Go Ahead Eagles came up just short in the UEFA Europa League on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，前进之鹰队在欧足联欧洲联赛中遗憾落败。

title: FC Utrecht suffer sixth straight defeat as Celtic claim Europa League win in Glasgow
title_zh: 乌得勒支队遭遇六连败，凯尔特人队在格拉斯哥赢得欧联杯胜利
description: FC Utrecht finished their UEFA Europa League campaign with a loss on Thursday. Ron Jans’ side were beaten 4-2 by Celtic in Glasgow, which tops off an abysmal European campaign for the side.
description_zh: 乌得勒支足球俱乐部周四以一场失利结束了他们的欧联杯征程。罗恩·扬斯率领的球队在格拉斯哥以2-4不敌凯尔特人，这场失利也为他们糟糕的欧战之旅画上了句号。

title: More than 15,000 long COVID patients in the Netherlands declared disabled
title_zh: 荷兰超过15000名新冠长期患者被宣布残疾
description: More than 15,000 post-COVID patients in the Netherlands have been officially declared fully or partially disabled by the Employee Insurance Agency (UWV), nearly six years after the pandemic began.
description_zh: 在新冠疫情爆发近六年之后，荷兰雇员保险局 (UWV) 已正式宣布超过 15,000 名新冠后遗症患者完全或部分丧失劳动能力。

title: Action sets record with 384 new stores, expands to 14 countries
title_zh: Action 创下新店数量 384 家的纪录，业务拓展至 14 个国家。
description: Action set another record last year by opening a large number of new stores, the company said on Thursday.
description_zh: Action公司周四表示，该公司去年通过开设大量新店，再次创下纪录。

title: Waalwijk man, 72,  held for threatening Papendrecht mayor online over asylum reception
title_zh: 瓦尔韦克（Waalwijk）72岁男子因庇护接待问题在网上威胁帕彭德雷赫特（Papendrecht）市长而被捕
description: A 72-year-old resident of Waalwijk, North Brabant, was taken into custody on Thursday for making online threats against the mayor of Papendrecht in Zuid-Holland.
description_zh: 一名居住在北布拉班特省瓦尔韦克的 72 岁男子于周四被警方拘留，原因是他在网上威胁南荷兰省帕彭德雷赫特市市长。

title: Weight-loss drug use doubles to nearly 80,000 current patients in the Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰减肥药使用量翻了一番，目前患者人数接近8万人
description: Dutch doctors are prescribing nearly twice as many weight-loss medications as last year, with an estimated 80,000 people currently using drugs such as Ozempic and Wegovy, according to data from the
description_zh: 根据荷兰医学研究协会（FIA）的数据，荷兰医生开出的减肥药处方数量几乎是去年的两倍，估计目前有8万人正在服用诸如Ozempic和Wegovy之类的药物。

title: Hoofddorp school discriminated against Muslim student over prayer, rights body says
title_zh: 人权组织称，霍夫多普一所学校因穆斯林学生祈祷而歧视他们。
description: The Netherlands Institute for Human Rights has found that a secondary school in Hoofddorp discriminated against a Muslim student.
description_zh: 荷兰人权研究所发现，霍夫多普的一所中学歧视了一名穆斯林学生。

title: Swedish teenager arrested over January 16 shooting outside Alphen aan den Rijn prison
title_zh: 瑞典少年因 1 月 16 日在 Alphen aan den Rijn 监狱外发生枪击事件被捕
description: A teenage boy in Sweden has been taken into custody in connection with the January 16
description_zh: 瑞典一名十几岁的男孩因涉嫌参与1月16日发生的事件而被拘留。

title: Number of Dutch adults who rarely follow news doubles in three years
title_zh: 三年内，很少关注新闻的荷兰成年人数量翻了一番。
description: The number of Dutch adults who rarely or never follow the news has doubled in the last three years.
description_zh: 过去三年里，很少或从不关注新闻的荷兰成年人数量翻了一番。

title: Video: Women accuse cop of police brutality, racism after violent Utrecht arrest
title_zh: 视频：乌得勒支暴力逮捕事件后，多名女性指控警察存在暴力执法和种族歧视行为
description: Two women are accusing a police officer of police brutality after he kicked one and hit the other with his baton during an arrest at a Utrecht shopping center on Monday.
description_zh: 周一，在乌得勒支一家购物中心，一名警察在逮捕过程中踢了一名女子，并用警棍击打了另一名女子，两名女子指控该警察滥用职权。

title: Stand in Mark Rutte’s shoes: signed sneakers up for auction
title_zh: 体验马克·吕特的感受：签名运动鞋即将拍卖
description: A pair of All Star sneakers signed by Mark Rutte, lunch with Dilan Yesilgöz and a dinner service presented to...
description_zh: 一双马克·吕特签名的All Star运动鞋，与迪兰·耶希尔戈兹共进午餐，以及一套赠送的晚餐餐具……

title: Scabies cases surge in Netherlands, hitting daycares and nursing homes
title_zh: 荷兰疥疮病例激增，托儿所和养老院受到冲击
description: The number of scabies infections in the Netherlands has risen sharply since the COVID-19 pandemic, spreading from students to daycare centers and nursing homes.
description_zh: 自新冠疫情爆发以来，荷兰的疥疮感染病例数量急剧上升，从学生群体蔓延到托儿所和养老院。

title: More people have a Museumkaart, and digital cards are popular
title_zh: 越来越多的人拥有博物馆卡，电子卡也很受欢迎。
description: A record 1.54 million people in the Netherlands now have a Museumkaart, which entitles the holder to free or reduced...
description_zh: 荷兰目前有创纪录的154万人持有博物馆卡，持卡人可享受免费或优惠的参观待遇……

title: Use of weight-loss drugs in the Netherlands almost doubles
title_zh: 荷兰减肥药的使用量几乎翻了一番
description: Some 80,000 people in the Netherlands are now being prescribed weight loss drugs such as Ozempic en Wegovy, almost double...
description_zh: 目前荷兰约有8万人正在服用减肥药，例如Ozempic和Wegovy，几乎是之前的两倍……

title: Utrecht Mayor Sharon Dijksma nominated for second 6-year term
title_zh: 乌得勒支市长 Sharon Dijksma 获得第二个 6 年任期提名
description: The Utrecht city council has nominated Sharon Dijksma for reappointment as mayor of Utrecht.
description_zh: 乌特勒支市议会提名莎伦·迪克斯玛连任乌特勒支市市长。

title: ING posts strong quarterly earnings, annual profit nearly unchanged
title_zh: ING公布强劲的季度盈利，年度利润基本持平
description: ING significantly increased its quarterly profit, partly because interest income showed a clear rise once again.
description_zh: ING的季度利润大幅增长，部分原因是利息收入再次出现明显增长。

title: Some 15,000 long-Covid patients may be left without care
title_zh: 约有15000名新冠后遗症患者可能得不到治疗。
description: Almost six years after the Covid pandemic started, some 15,000 people are officially unable to work full time, according to...
description_zh: 新冠疫情爆发近六年之后，据统计，约有15000人正式无法全职工作……

title: Storm Kristin kills 83-year-old Dutch woman in Portugal; Body found inside car in water
title_zh: 克里斯汀风暴在葡萄牙造成一名83岁荷兰妇女死亡；尸体在水中的汽车内被发现
description: On Thursday, Storm Kristin, which originated from a rapidly intensifying low-pressure system off the Iberian Peninsula, claimed the life of an 83-year-old Dutch woman in southern Portugal.
description_zh: 周四，源自伊比利亚半岛附近迅速增强的低压系统的克里斯汀风暴在葡萄牙南部夺走了一名 83 岁荷兰妇女的生命。
